case_title: AMISH PATEL VS. IRENE BENTON et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, AMISH AS TO DEFENDANT BENTON, IRENE DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BENTON, IRENE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, AMISH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENTON, IRENE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 706 POLK STREET, #44, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLTF
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $22.50 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, AMISH
